title: Smarter Llamas with vision capabilities
summary:
Smarter Llama models, opt-in safety guardrails, and a fresh batch of community apps.

The default Llama endpoint just got a brain upgrade to Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct. We also wired up the Maverick and Scout variants, meaning you can now pass images to Llama directly through the standard text generation endpoint.

Added an optional moderation layer using AWS Bedrock Guardrails. Pass a `safe` parameter or `Pollinations-Safe` header to keep inputs and outputs clean. We also patched an edge case where massive prompts would crash the safety check—it now gracefully scans the last 50,000 characters instead of throwing a fit.

The ecosystem is growing. We added Lkalma (an infinite canvas whiteboard), Storyframe Studio (an open-source creative workspace), and the Pollinations AIGC Control Console to the directory. Three more Flowers blooming in the garden.
